text: Unable to fetch current weather data for your field. The system is showing cached data from 2 hours ago. The weather service should be back online shortly.

alert.title: Weather API Unavailable
alert.message: Connection to weather service failed. The system will retry automatically in 5 minutes.
alert.details: Request timed out after 30 seconds. Remote server returned status: 504 Gateway Timeout. Last successful sync: 2025-01-12T08:35:22Z
alert.action: Retry now or use cached data from 2 hours ago
